Don’t Breathe 2 (2021)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $32,638,038Details
International Box Office $14,563,309
Worldwide Box Office $47,201,347
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $864,657
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,095,774
Total $1,960,431
Further financial details...

Synopsis

The sequel is set in the years following the initial deadly home invasion, where Norman Nordstrom lives in quiet solace until his past sins catch up to him.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$10,622,473 (32.5% of total gross)
Legs:3.07 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:69.1% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$15,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,005 opening theaters/3,005 max. theaters, 4.9 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $38,382,594

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: August 13th, 2021 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: August 12th, 2021 (Wide) (Mexico)
August 12th, 2021 (Wide), released as Nem Respires 2 (Portugal)
August 13th, 2021 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
August 13th, 2021 (Wide) (Russia (CIS))
August 13th, 2021 (Wide), released as Mirties namai 2 (Lithuania)
Video Release: October 12th, 2021 by Sony Pictures Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: R for strong bloody violence, gruesome images, and language.
(Rating bulletin 2681 (cert #53215), 5/19/2021)
Running Time: 98 minutes
Franchise: Don’t Breathe
Plot point: Blindness, Kidnap, Orphan, Rescue, Single Parent, Unexpected Families
Subgenre: Psychological Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Screen Gems, Stage 6 Films
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English
